hooks.command: bash -c 'repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; hook="$repo/scripts/agent-hooks/stop-evaluate-skill.sh"; test -f "$hook" || exit 0; exec bash "$hook"'
bash -c 'repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; hook="$repo/scripts/agent-hooks/stop-plugin-eval.sh"; test -f "$hook" || exit 0; exec bash "$hook"'
bash -c 'repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; hook="$repo/scripts/agent-hooks/stop-ip-hygiene.sh"; test -f "$hook" || exit 0; exec bash "$hook"'
